introSection:
Dr. Diabolical's Cliffhanger is a steel floorless roller coaster currently located at Six Flags Fiesta Texas in San Antonio, Texas, USA. It is a Dive Coaster manufactured by Bolliger & Mabillard and opened on July 30, 2022.

The ride is tall and features floorless ride vehicles. It is the sixth Dive Coaster to be built in North America.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Dr. Diabolical's Cliffhanger was announced on July 28, 2021 at the park by park president, Jeffrey Siebert.

Vertical construction began in early 2022. In March, the highest portion of the ride was topped off. Track installation was completed in early April. On July 7, the park announced that the ride would open on July 30. The ride had its grand opening on July 30, 2022.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Riders are held in by vest harnesses, similar to Valravn at Cedar Point.

fullText:
Dr. Diabolical's Cliffhanger is a steel floorless roller coaster currently located at Six Flags Fiesta Texas in San Antonio, Texas, USA. It is a Dive Coaster manufactured by Bolliger & Mabillard and opened on July 30, 2022.

The ride is tall and features floorless ride vehicles. It is the sixth Dive Coaster to be built in North America.

Dr. Diabolical's Cliffhanger was announced on July 28, 2021 at the park by park president, Jeffrey Siebert.

Vertical construction began in early 2022. In March, the highest portion of the ride was topped off. Track installation was completed in early April. On July 7, the park announced that the ride would open on July 30. The ride had its grand opening on July 30, 2022.



Riders are held in by vest harnesses, similar to Valravn at Cedar Point.
